Index: flwm/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/FreeBSD/ports/x11-wm/flwm/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -u -r1.4 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/04/27 03:34:35	1.4
+++ Makefile	1999/05/16 10:07:17
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   	flwm
-# Version required:			0.22
+# Version required:			0.24
 # Date created:				12 February 1999
 # Whom:                			Dima Sivachenko <dima@chg.ru>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.4 1999/04/27 03:34:35 mharo Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	flwm-0.23
+DISTNAME=	flwm-0.24
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.cinenet.net/users/spitzak/flwm/ \
 		ftp://ftp.sai.msu.su/pub/X11/win_man/
@@ -18,7 +18,6 @@
 
 USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ENV=	CXXFLAGS="${CFLAGS}"
 MAN1=		flwm.1
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
